SOURCE: 46260230.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (46260230.pdf)
SUMMARY: Passionate IT professional with over 10 years of experience in support, analysis, and quality assurance. Skilled in hardware/software installation, system optimization, network administration, and project management.
SKILLS: Server and System Administration, Reporting and Analysis, End-User Training, Quality Control, Critical Thinking, Data Management, Network Administration, Experience in Leadership, Supervision, Hardware Repair, Computer Configurations, System Upgrades, New Program Installations, Organizational Leadership, Troubleshooting and Maintenance, Equipment Repair, Power and Hand Tool Use, Troubleshooting and Repairs, Preventative Maintenance, Telecommunications Systems, Component Repairs, Multitasking, Part Inspections, Friendly, Positive Attitude, LAN and WAN Configurations, Active Directory Knowledge, Cybersecurity Analysis, Soldering, Database Management, Technical Knowledge of Server System Softwares, Servers, Storage Systems, Network Equipment, PCs or Notebooks

SOURCE: 46260230.pdf
JOB TITLE: Information Technology Specialist
COMPANY: Discountpcfix
DATES: 11/2011 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Assisted with new computer and network equipment purchases.', 'Updated or installed software to ensure computer efficiency.', 'Performed diagnostics for repairs and backed up data.', 'Resolved hardware issues using diagnostic tools.', 'Upgraded laptops/desktops, fixed Apple product damages, and resolved technical issues.', 'Configured computers and connected them to printers and other peripherals.', 'Serviced and repaired equipment according to manufacturer guidelines.']

SOURCE: 46260230.pdf
JOB TITLE: Quality Control Inspector Contractor
COMPANY: Current Company Name
DATES: 04/2019 - Current
DESCRIPTION: ['Conferred with engineers to resolve design, research, and testing problems.', 'Developed best practices for defect prevention and continuous improvement.', 'Inspected finished products and documented nonconformities.']

SOURCE: 46260230.pdf
JOB TITLE: Network Analyst
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 06/2016 - 05/2018
DESCRIPTION: ['Identified operational and performance issues and resolved them with managers.', 'Provided technical support for network applications.']

SOURCE: 46260230.pdf
JOB TITLE: Quality Control Manager
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/2013 - 08/2015
DESCRIPTION: ['Monitored quality control of finished products.', 'Directed team members in setting and achieving goals.']
